CREATE TABLE test_table (A INT, B INT);
SELECT argMax(A, B, 2) FROM (SELECT A, B FROM test_table WHERE B > 15);
CREATE TABLE another_table (A INT, C INT);
SELECT argMax(A, B, 1) FROM (SELECT A, B FROM test_table JOIN another_table ON test_table.A = another_table.A);
CREATE TABLE mixed_table (D INT, E FLOAT);
SELECT argMax(D, E, 2) FROM mixed_table WHERE E > 2;
SELECT argMax(A, B, 1) FROM test_table WHERE A IN (SELECT A FROM another_table WHERE C > 10);
SELECT argMax(A, B, 2) FROM (SELECT A, SUM(B) AS total FROM test_table GROUP BY A) AS grouped_table;
